one_comment:
jmlwinder: Such a fabulous scene--great shot, Jonathan. 👍👍
I remember being in about this same spot on a visit back in the 1970s, but my memory is in black and white. 😄 I don't know why I don't have a Kodachrome slide of this in my archives but I sure don't.
